title: Child and Youth Welfare Policy Planning in Municipalities 2008-2009: Office-holder Group Interviews
description: In the study, municipal office-holders were interviewed about child and youth welfare policy planning and implementation. Opinions were probed on the planning obligation imposed by the law, role of the interviewees' own administrative sector in the planning, implementation and monitoring of such welfare policies, differences of view and focus between administrative sectors, what issues the policies should cover and what kind of impact they should have.
